zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell於1338年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell20歲，母親Baroness Avice Bellers20歲。他於1352年1月20日之前與Maud de Bernanke在英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell于1338年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell20岁，母亲Baroness Avice Bellers20岁。他于1352年1月20日之前与Maud de Bernanke在英国諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾藍布利。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell was born in 1338, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Cromwell, was 20 and his mother, Baroness Avice Bellers, was 20. He married Maud de Bernanke before 20 January 1352, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He was buried in Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell est né en 1338, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Baroness Avice Bellers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Bernanke avant 20 janvier 1352, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Ilenterré à Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 1338 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell 20 und seine Mutter Baroness Avice Bellers 20. Er hat vor 20. Januar 1352 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England Maud de Bernanke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er wurde in Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell è nato il nel 1338 nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Cromwell, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Avice Bellers, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Bernanke prima del 20 gennaio 1352, nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Fu sepolto a Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellが1338年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwellは20歳，母Baroness Avice Bellersは20歳であった。1352年1月20日以前にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルでMaud de Bernankeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(이)가 1338년 영국 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Avice Bellers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1352년 1월 20일 이전 영국 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 Maud de Bernanke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램리에 묻혔다.

mn.Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England: Lambley, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell nasceu em 1338, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Cromwell, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Avice Bellers, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Bernanke antes 20 de janeiro de 1352, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell родился в 1338 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Avice Bellers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Bernanke перед 20 январь 1352 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности лэмбли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell nació en 1338, en Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Cromwell, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Baroness Avice Bellers, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maud de Bernanke antes de 20 de enero de 1352, en Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Fue sepultado en Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
